engagement.title: Ways to Get Involved
engagement.description: Find your place in our research community and contribute to advancing culturally grounded psychology

opportunities.title: Student Research Opportunities
opportunities.description: Join our research team as a graduate assistant or research intern. Gain hands-on experience in culturally grounded psychology research.

opportunities.title: Research Collaboration
opportunities.description: Partner with us on research projects, grant applications, or academic publications in psychology and mental health.

opportunities.title: Community Engagement
opportunities.description: Participate in our community workshops, mental health awareness programs, and cultural psychology initiatives.

testimonials.name: Prof. Luzelle Naudé
testimonials.quote: Stephen brings clarity, compassion, and intellectual depth to both research and mentorship. He is a thoughtful collaborator with a strong grounding in culturally meaningful scholarship.
testimonials.context: Research collaboration on Africa Long Life Study

testimonials.name: Dr. Elizabeth Shino
testimonials.quote: His work bridges practice and academia in a way that feels rigorous, humane, and deeply relevant to African realities.

testimonials.name: Research Mentee
testimonials.quote: Dr. Asatsa creates space for bold thinking while giving practical guidance that makes research feel possible and purposeful.

academic.name: Catholic University of Eastern Africa
academic.description: Home base for HDLK-L research activities

academic.description: Lead institution for Africa Long Life Study

resources.description: Access our research methodologies, assessment tools, and cultural psychology frameworks.
